examples: Experimental results show that JPEG method is an effective method for digital compression and coding of ultrasonic televiewer images.
On borehole televiewer logs. An unusual effect produced on the cathode-ray tube display by erratic movement of the tool as it drags along the borehole.
With a model for the ultrasonic signal, the requirement on receiver and transmitter performance and the detection accuracy of the bearings of an ultrasonic borehole televiewer are discussed.
